summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HubSpot CRM clone MVP. Backend APIs fully functional with 16/16 tests passed. Frontend core functionality working with successful user flows for registration, login, lead/deal management, navigation, theme toggle, and logout. Minor UI interaction issues with dropdowns in modals identified but not blocking core functionality.

ui_bugs.component: Lead Creation Modal - Company Size Select
ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown options not clickable in modal overlay - option elements are not visible/clickable
ui_bugs.workaround: Form can be submitted with required fields only, optional dropdowns can be skipped

ui_bugs.issue: Similar dropdown selection issue in lead source field

design_issues.issue: Charts on dashboard showing console warnings about width/height being -1
design_issues.details: Recharts library warning - charts still render correctly but may have sizing issues on some viewports

passed_tests: Lead CRUD operations with AI scoring
Deal CRUD operations with health scoring
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Leads, Pipeline, Settings)
Lead display in table with AI scores
Deal creation and display in pipeline
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dropdown interaction issues in modal forms - select elements in lead/deal creation forms need better clickability handling. Consider using different dropdown component or fixing z-index/visibility issues.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% - Core functionality working, minor dropdown interaction issues
success_percentage.ai_features: 100% - AI scoring and insights working with Claude Sonnet 4.5
